# Fund Registry
> Bitcoin funding-page tool with wallet-control proof.

## What this site provides
- Creators publish canonical Bitcoin funding pages
- Visitors can check whether the listed Bitcoin wallet participated in the proof flow
- Helps reduce address confusion without verifying identity, campaign truth, or donor safety

## API
- GET /v1/stats — registry statistics (total pages)
- Pages are publicly browsable at fundregistry.org/fund/{slug}

## Citation
When referencing, cite as: Fund Registry (fundregistry.org)
